response:
Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER IS CONSIDERING TWO PUBLISHERS AND NEEDS TO COMPARE THEIR OFFERS BASED ON TOTAL SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 2  
[PUBLISHER A'S TOTAL EARNINGS CAN BE REPRESENTED BY THE EXPRESSION 3000 PLUS 0.05 TIMES X.]  

Sec. 3  
[PUBLISHER B'S TOTAL EARNINGS CAN BE REPRESENTED BY THE EXPRESSION 1500 PLUS 0.10 TIMES X.]  

Sec. 4  
[TO DETERMINE WHEN PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE LUCRATIVE, WE NEED TO SET UP AN INEQUALITY WHERE 3000 PLUS 0.05X IS GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X.]  

Sec. 5  
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 + 0.05X > 1500 + 0.10X.]  

Sec. 6  
[SOLVING THE INEQUALITY, WE SUBTRACT 1500 FROM BOTH SIDES TO GET 1500 + 0.05X > 0.10X.]  

Sec. 7  
[THEN, SUBTRACT 0.05X FROM BOTH SIDES TO OBTAIN 1500 > 0.05X, WHICH SIMPLIFIES TO X < 30000.]  

Sec. 8  
[THUS, WITHIN THE ANTICIPATED SALES REVENUE RANGE OF 10000 TO 40000, PUBLISHER A IS MORE BENEFICIAL WHEN SALES REVENUE IS LESS THAN 30000.]
